_comment: Single source of truth for public pricing. Update here first, then sync the site, docs, and Stripe products.
_modelNote: Subscriptions are unlimited AI usage per tier. Credits are taste-test only (free tier) and optional add-ons for power users beyond plan.

creditPacks._note: Add-on packs for free-tier users who want more without subscribing. Subscribers get unlimited AI; packs are for free users only.

hostedCloud.summary: The hosted dashboard and remote credit checks align with these tiers. Pro and Team subscribers have unlimited AI features; no credit counting.

free.name: Free
free._includedCreditsNote: 10 one-time starter credits (defaultFreeCredits) to taste AI features. No monthly replenishment on free tier.
